errorPlayerCount: ❌ Invalid player count ({n}). Please mention between 5 and 16 players.
errorPlayerCountMin5: ❌ Too few players. You need at least 5 players to start a game.
errorPlayerCountMax16: ❌ Too many players. The maximum is 16 people (including a potential storyteller).
errorNotGameChannel: ❌ This command can only be used in an active game channel.
errorAlreadyDecided: ❌ A storyteller has already been decided for this game.
errorIamNeedsSix: ❌ There are only 5 people in this game. Using `/iam` would leave only 4 players — below the minimum of 5. Use `/youare` instead.
errorYouareNeedsFifteen: ❌ There are 16 people in this game. Automated mode cannot manage 16 players — the maximum is 15. Please use `/iam` so one person becomes the storyteller.
errorNotStoryteller: ❌ Only the storyteller can send commands in DM during role assignment.
errorNoActiveGame: ❌ No active game found for your current storyteller session.
errorAlreadyConfirmed: ❌ The draft has already been confirmed. No further changes are accepted.
gameCreating: Shadows gather for {players}… Conjuring the chamber.
chooseStoryteller: Step forward as the Storyteller with `/iam`, or surrender the night to fate with `/youare`.
iamAccepted:
🎭 **{username}** takes the Storyteller's chair. The loom of destiny rests in mortal hands—the ritual runs in **Manual Mode**.
A version of fate has been whispered to the Storyteller via DM.
youareAccepted: 🌑 The clocktower chimes. **Automated Mode** activated. The Storyteller has been chosen by fate itself.
rolesDistributed: ✅ The roles are cast. Each soul now carries a secret—the night draws close.
roleDmBeginnerGuide:
**A word of guidance:**
• Listen well, share what you know, and stand with your kin.
roleDmDrunkNote: *(You walk in fog—you believe yourself to be this Townsfolk, but your ability never works and what you hear may be false.)*
draftCommands:
Commands (one per line), end with CONFIRM:
• `SWAP <p1> <p2>`               — exchange two players' roles
• `ROLE <player> <new-role>`     — replace a player's role (same category; Baron rules apply)
• `HERRING <player>`             — change the Fortune Teller's red herring
• `DRUNK <role>`                 — change the Drunk's fake role
• `BLUFF <role1>, <role2>, <role3>` — change the Imp's bluff roles
• `ASSIGN` (block)               — replace the entire assignment (list every player: role, end with CONFIRM)
• `CONFIRM`                       — finalize and send roles to all players
draftCmdAmbiguousPlayer: ❌ Ambiguous player name: "{name}". Please use the full username.
draftCmdAssignUsage: ❌ Usage: `ASSIGN` followed by one `<player>: <role>` per line, then `CONFIRM`.
draftCmdHerringNotGood: ❌ Red Herring must be a non-Demon Good player.
draftCmdHerringNoFT: ❌ Fortune Teller is not in play — HERRING command is not applicable.
draftCmdDrunkNotInPlay: ❌ Drunk is not in play — DRUNK command is not applicable.
draftCmdDrunkAlreadyAssigned: ❌ "{name}" is already assigned to a real player.
draftCmdBluffNoImp: ❌ Imp is not in play — BLUFF command is not applicable.
draftCmdBluffAlreadyAssigned: ❌ "{name}" is already assigned to a real player.
draftCmdBluffDuplicate: ❌ All three bluff roles must be distinct.
draftCmdAssignParseError: ❌ Cannot parse assignment line: "{line}". Expected format: `<player>: <role>`
draftCmdAssignPlayerCount: ❌ ASSIGN block has {got} player assignment(s) but the game has {want} players.
draftCmdAssignBluffNotFound: ❌ One or more bluff roles not found.
draftConfirmed: ✅ The seal is set. Fates sent into the night…
draftCmdHerringSuccess: ✅ The Fortune Teller's Red Herring is {player}.
draftCmdDrunkSuccess: ✅ The Drunk thinks they are the {role}.
rulebookListTitle: 📖 **Trouble Brewing — Role List**  |  Use `/rulebook role:<name>` for a detailed rules reminder
rulebookListFooter: Role names in English or Chinese are both accepted.
rulebookRoleNotFound: ❌ Unknown role: "{name}". Use `/rulebook` (no argument) to see all roles.
validErrMinionMin: There must be at least 1 Minion.
validErrDrunkNoFake: Drunk is in play but has no fake role assigned.
validErrDrunkFakeMustBeTownsfolk: Drunk's fake role must be a Townsfolk.
validErrDrunkFakeAssigned: Drunk's fake role ({role}) is already assigned to a real player.
validErrFtNoHerring: Fortune Teller is in play but no Red Herring is designated.
validErrHerringNotGood: Red Herring must be a non-Demon Good player.
validErrImpNoBluffs: Imp is in play but no bluff roles are set.
validErrBluffNotTownsfolk: Bluff role {role} is not a Townsfolk.
validErrBluffAssigned: Bluff role {role} is already assigned to a real player.
validErrBluffNotDistinct: Imp bluff roles must be 3 distinct roles.
validErrBaronNotMinion: Cannot assign Baron to a non-Minion slot (current role: {role}).
validErrRoleAssigned: {role} is already assigned to another player.
noteClearedDrunkFake: Auto-cleared Drunk fake role (Drunk not in play).
noteClearedRedHerring: Auto-cleared Red Herring (Fortune Teller not in play).
noteClearedImpBluffs: Auto-cleared Imp bluffs (Imp not in play).
clocktowerServerOnly: This command can only be used in a server.
clocktowerFetchError: ❌ Could not fetch user <@{id}>. Make sure they are in the server.
ctestGameChannelReady:
🧪 **[TEST MODE]** {gameHeader}
All DMs for fake players will be redirected to <@{ownerId}>.
iamDmFailed: ⚠️ The whisper could not reach you. Please enable DMs from server members.
roleSenderDmFailed: ⚠️ Fate's message could not reach {ref}. Please ensure your DMs are open for this server.
infoNoActiveGame: ❌ No active game found. Use this command inside a game channel, or have an active game as a player or Storyteller.
infoWinGoodMayor: • **Good wins** (Mayor): Only 3 players remain alive and no execution occurs that day.
infoWinEvil: • **Evil wins:** A Demon is alive and only 2 or fewer players remain alive.
infoWinEvilSaint: • **Evil wins** (Saint): The Saint is executed — Evil wins immediately.
whosleftNoNomination: 📋 No nomination vote is currently in progress.
whosleftNoPending: ✅ No pending player responses for the current night step.
dayGoodWins: 🌟 **GOOD WINS!** The Demon has been slain. The town is saved!
dayEvilWinsAlive: 🩸 **EVIL WINS!** Only two souls remain. The Demon's dominion is complete.
dayEvilWinsSaint: 💀 **EVIL WINS!** The Saint was executed. Good has lost.
dayScarletWomanBecomesImp: 🩸 The Demon has fallen. You are now the **Imp**. The game continues — act wisely.
dayScarletWomanStorytellerNotify: ⚡ Scarlet Woman triggered: **{player}** is now the Imp.
dayScarletWomanChannelNotify: ⚡ A dark power stirs in the shadows… the game continues.
dayVoteClosed: 🗳️ **Vote closed** for **{nominee}**: **{count}** vote(s) (need ≥{required} to qualify for execution).
dayAllNominated: 📋 All living players have been nominated — no further nominations are possible. The day ends.
dayNoExecution: ⚖️ **No execution today.** No player received enough votes (or there was a tie).
dayMayorWin: 🎖️ **{player}** (Mayor) invokes their power — **GOOD WINS!** Only 3 remain and no one was executed.
daySaintExecuted: 😱 **{player}** was the **Saint**! The Good team immediately loses!
dayNightFalls: 🌙 Night falls… Check your DMs for your night actions.
dayDawnPeaceful: ☀️ **Day {day}** dawns. The night was peaceful — no one died.
dayDawnDeaths: ☀️ **Day {day}** dawns. The following player(s) died during the night: **{players}**.
dayDiscussionOpen:
Players still alive ({count}): {players}

Free discussion is open. Commands available:
• `/nominate <player>` — nominate for execution
• `/ye` — vote for the current nominee
• `/slay <player>` — use Slayer ability
• `/endday` — vote to end the day
dayNoActiveGame: ❌ No active game in this channel.
dayNominationsNotOpen: ❌ Nominations are not open right now.
dayNotAPlayer: ❌ You are not a player in this game.
dayAlreadyNominated: ❌ You have already nominated someone today.
dayNoNewNominations: ❌ The day is ending — no new nominations can be started.
dayNominationInProgress: ❌ A nomination is already in progress. Wait for the current vote to close.
dayNomineeDead: ❌ **{player}** is dead and cannot be nominated.
dayVirginTriggered: ⚡ **Virgin** ability triggered! **{nominator}** (Townsfolk) is immediately executed for nominating the **Virgin**! The nomination closes with 0 votes.
dayNominate: 📜 **{nominator}** nominates **{nominee}** for execution! Vote with `/ye` within **1 minute**. ({nominator}'s vote is automatic.)
dayNotInGame: ❌ You are not in this game.
dayVotingNotOpen: ❌ Voting is not open right now.
dayNoActiveNomination: ❌ No active nomination to vote on.
dayGhostVoteUsed: ❌ Your ghost vote has already been used. You have no more votes.
dayAlreadyVoted: ❌ You have already voted on this nomination.
dayVoteRecorded: ✅ Your vote for **{nominee}** has been recorded.{ghostNote}
dayNotDaytime: ❌ It is not daytime right now.
daySlayAnnounce: ⚔️ **{slayer}** claims to be the Slayer and targets **{target}**!
daySlayPending: ⏳ The outcome of the slay is pending Storyteller confirmation.
daySlayBluffStNotify:
SLAY: {slayer} targeted {target}. But {slayer} is not the slayer - that's just bluffing. Nothing happens.
Reply `SLAY CONFIRM` to confirm their fate.
daySlayBluffStLog: SLAY: {slayer} targeted {target}. But {slayer} is not the slayer - that's just bluffing. Nothing happens.
daySlayPoisonedStNotify:
SLAY: {slayer} targeted {target}. {slayer} is the Slayer, but is poisoned. Nothing happens, and the ability is not consumed.
Reply `SLAY CONFIRM` to confirm their fate.
daySlayPoisonedStLog: SLAY: {slayer} targeted {target}. {slayer} is the Slayer, but is poisoned. Nothing happens, and the ability is not consumed.
daySlayUsedStNotify:
SLAY: {slayer} targeted {target}. {slayer} is the Slayer, but the slay ability is already consumed. Nothing happens.
Reply `SLAY CONFIRM` to confirm their fate.
daySlayUsedStLog: SLAY: {slayer} targeted {target}. {slayer} is the Slayer, but the slay ability is already consumed. Nothing happens.
daySlayRecluseNothing: 🌫️ Nothing happens. (The Recluse does not register as the Demon.)
daySlayRecluseProposalNothing: NOTHING (Recluse does not register as Demon)
daySlayDemonStNotify:
SLAY: {slayer} (Slayer) targeted {target} (Demon). Demon dies.
Reply `SLAY CONFIRM` to confirm their fate.
daySlayDemonDies: 💀 **{target}** is the **Demon** — slain by the Slayer!
daySlayNotDemonStNotify:
SLAY: {slayer} (Slayer) targeted {target} (not the Demon). Nothing happens.
Reply `SLAY CONFIRM` to confirm their fate.
daySlayNotDemonStLog: SLAY: {slayer} (Slayer) targeted {target} (not the Demon). Nothing happens.
dayCancelNomination: 📋 The nomination of **{player}** is cancelled — they have died.
dayStorytellerCalledEnd: 📋 The Storyteller has called for the day to end. The current vote will finish, then execution is decided.
dayEndDayVoteRecorded: ✅ Your vote to end the day has been recorded ({count}/{threshold} needed).
dayEndDayThreshold: 📋 The majority has voted to end the day ({count}/{total} alive). No new nominations may be started.
dayEndDayThresholdSuffix: The current vote will finish first.
daySlayRecluseNoPending: No pending Recluse slay to resolve.
nightJudgeJoke: I'll be the judge of that.
nightFortuneTellerPrompt: 🌙 Night falls. Choose **two players** to read tonight. Reply as: `name1, name2`.
nightButlerPrompt: 🌙 Night falls. Choose your **master** (cannot be yourself). Reply with one player name.
nightMonkPrompt: 🌙 Night falls. Choose one player to protect tonight (cannot be yourself). Reply with one name.
nightImpPrompt: 🌙 Night falls. Choose one player to kill tonight. Reply with one name.
nightPoisonerPrompt: 🌙 Night falls. Choose one player to poison tonight and tomorrow day. Reply with one name.
nightAckPrompt: 🌙 Night falls. Your information is being prepared. Reply with `{token}` when you are ready.
nightJokePrompt:
🌙 {joke}

What do you think about this joke? Reply with one word.
nightBegins: 🌙 **Night {n}** has begun. Check your DMs and respond to the bot.
nightPairRoleInfo: You are shown that one of {p1} and {p2} is the {role}.
nightEmpathCount: Tonight, your alive neighbors are {left} and {right}. You sense {count} Evil neighbor(s).
nightChefCount: Tonight, you learn: {count} adjacent Evil pair(s).
nightUndertakerRole: You learn that the executed player was: {role}.
nightLibrarianNoOutsiders: You learn that there are no Outsiders in play.
nightInteractionRecorded: Your night interaction has been recorded.
nightRavenkeeperPickPrompt: ☀️ You died at night. **Ravenkeeper** — wake up and choose any player to learn their true character. Reply with the player's name.
nightInfoPreview:
🕯️ Night {n} — Step 3 preview (random-event outcomes).
Step 2 responses summary:
{summary}

Each line is labeled as 🎲 RANDOMIZED or 📌 FIXED.
Commands:
`SET <player> <field> <value>` (use editable fields shown per line)
`OVERRIDE <player>: <full message>` (replace the whole line)
When ready, reply `SEND`.

{preview}
nightSetNoTemplate: No field-based template for {player}. Use OVERRIDE instead.
nightOverrideRejected: OVERRIDE rejected for {player}. Only drunk/poisoned outputs may be arbitrary. Use SET for editable fields or keep truthful constraints.
nightUnrecognizedInput: Unrecognized input. Use SET / OVERRIDE lines and/or SEND.
nightEditsApplied:
✅ Edits applied. Keep editing with `SET <player> <field> <value>` or `OVERRIDE <player>: <message>`, or reply `SEND` to dispatch final messages.

{preview}
nightCannotChooseSelf: You cannot choose yourself for this ability.
nightDraftDifferentPlayers: p1 and p2 must be different players.
nightDraftFieldNotEditable: Field "{field}" is not editable for this template. Editable: {fields}
nightReasonDecoyPair: decoy pair randomized by storyteller model
impersonateUnknownPlayer: ❌ No fake player named "{name}" in this game.
